<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<h1>Source code for booktx.profile_migration</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Legacy single-layout -&gt; translation-profile migration.</span>

<span class="sd">This module quarantines the compatibility surface that migrates an old</span>
<span class="sd">single-layout project (all state under ``.booktx/``) into the profile layout</span>
<span class="sd">(shared source state under ``.booktx/``, mutable translation state under</span>
<span class="sd">``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/``).</span>

<span class="sd">The migration is staged and uses an explicit :class:`ProfileMigrationPlan` so</span>
<span class="sd">dry-run output, preflight validation, and tests share one typed structure.</span>
<span class="sd">CLI identity overrides (``--model``/``--actor``/``--harness``) are honored over</span>
<span class="sd">any legacy ``.booktx/identity.json``.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="c1"># ruff: noqa: E501</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">json</span>
<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">shutil</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">datetime</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">datetime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timezone</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">pathlib</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Literal</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_default_output_filename</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_is_legacy_layout</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_is_profile_layout</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_legacy_manifest_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_context_json_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_context_md_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_identity_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_ingest_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_ledger_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_output_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_reports_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_reviews_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_store_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_tasks_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_profile_translated_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_source_manifest_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">_write_source_config</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">load_identity</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">load_project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">write_profile_config</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">write_profile_root_marker</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_manifest</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">sha256_path</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_json_model_atomic</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">ProfileIdentityConfig</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;MigrationMove&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;ProfileMigrationPlan&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;build_profile_migration_plan&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;migrate_current_project&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>


<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frozen</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One file or directory relocation performed during profile migration.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
    <span class="n">destination</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
    <span class="n">kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;file&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;either&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;either&quot;</span>


<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frozen</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ProfileMigrationPlan</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolved, validated plan for migrating a legacy project to a profile.</span>

<span class="sd">    Captures the final source config, profile config, authoritative</span>
<span class="sd">    identity (honoring CLI overrides), and the ordered list of moves. The</span>
<span class="sd">    move list is typed so dry-run output, preflight validation, and tests</span>
<span class="sd">    share one explicit structure instead of ad-hoc ``(source, dest)`` tuples.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
    <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_config</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span>
    <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span>
    <span class="n">identity</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span>
    <span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_profile_migration_plan</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProfileMigrationPlan</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build the resolved migration plan without writing anything.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_identity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_identity</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">identity_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProfileIdentityConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">actor</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">legacy_identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">legacy_identity</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;user:unknown&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">harness</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">legacy_identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">legacy_identity</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;booktx&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">model</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">legacy_identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">legacy_identity</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;human&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_default_output_filename</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">identity</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">moves</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_legacy_manifest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">_source_manifest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_context_json_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.md&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_context_md_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;identity.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_identity_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation-store.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_store_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation-version-ledger.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_ledger_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;tasks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_tasks_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ingest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_ingest_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translated&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_translated_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;reports&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_reports_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">project_root</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;output&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">_profile_output_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;dir&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProfileMigrationPlan</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project_root</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">moves</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_migration_manifest_entries</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
    <span class="n">root_resolved</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_rel</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">relative_to</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root_resolved</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">move</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span>
        <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">_rel</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;destination&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">_rel</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">destination</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;exists&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">(),</span>
        <span class="p">}</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sha256_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_dir</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;entry_count&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">_</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rglob</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;*&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">entries</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_migration_destinations</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Preflight-check that moves only target the profile tree or source manifest.</span>

<span class="sd">    Migration replaces existing destinations, so guard the mutable surface</span>
<span class="sd">    explicitly: no destination may live outside</span>
<span class="sd">    ``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/`` except the shared ``.booktx/source-manifest.json``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">profile_root_resolved</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">source_manifest_resolved</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_source_manifest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">move</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">dst_resolved</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">destination</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dst_resolved</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">source_manifest_resolved</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">profile_root_resolved</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">dst_resolved</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;migration_destination_outside_profile&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;migration destination is outside the translation profile tree: &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">destination</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_write_migration_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">stamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">datetime</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timezone</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">utc</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strftime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;%Y%m</span><span class="si">%d</span><span class="s2">T%H%M%SZ&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">manifest_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;migrations&quot;</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stamp</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-profile-migration.json&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;timestamp&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">stamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;moves&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">_migration_manifest_entries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">manifest_path</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="migrate_current_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.migrate_current_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">migrate_current_project</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">dry_run</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">project_root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expanduser</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_is_profile_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;already_profile_project&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;project already uses translation profiles; use `booktx profile create` instead&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_is_legacy_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;legacy_project_required&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;project does not use the legacy single-layout format&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">legacy_project</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_target</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">target_language</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">legacy_target</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile_config_invalid&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;legacy project has no target language; pass --target to migrate-current&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile_root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">iterdir</span><span class="p">()):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;migration_target_exists&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;migration target already exists and is not empty: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">plan</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_profile_migration_plan</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">legacy_project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">legacy_target</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span>

    <span class="n">summary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;project&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;profile&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;target_language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">legacy_target</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;target_locale&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">legacy_target</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;dry_run&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">dry_run</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;moves&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="p">{</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">relative_to</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)),</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;destination&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">destination</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">relative_to</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)),</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;exists&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">(),</span>
            <span class="p">}</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">move</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">moves</span>
        <span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dry_run</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">summary</span>

    <span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Create every standard profile-local directory up front so a migration</span>
    <span class="c1"># from a legacy project that lacked some of these dirs still yields a</span>
    <span class="c1"># complete profile tree.</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_tasks_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_ingest_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_translated_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_reports_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_output_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_reviews_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Preflight: no destination may escape the profile tree or source manifest.</span>
    <span class="n">_validate_migration_destinations</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Record the migration plan (with source checksums) before mutating.</span>
    <span class="n">migration_manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_write_migration_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Move mutable legacy state first. If this phase raises, we have not yet</span>
    <span class="c1"># written the new profile config/identity or removed the legacy</span>
    <span class="c1"># ``config.toml``, so the project can be retried as a legacy project.</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">move</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">moves</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span>
        <span class="n">dst</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">move</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">destination</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">dst</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dst</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">dst</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_dir</span><span class="p">():</span>
                <span class="n">shutil</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rmtree</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">dst</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">dst</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unlink</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">shutil</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">dst</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="c1"># Write final config/identity only after all moves succeeded. The</span>
    <span class="c1"># plan&#39;s identity is authoritative and honors CLI overrides over the</span>
    <span class="c1"># moved legacy identity (P0 override-overwrite fix).</span>
    <span class="n">_write_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_profile_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_json_model_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_identity_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">identity</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_profile_root_marker</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Remove the legacy config only after every required write/move has</span>
    <span class="c1"># succeeded, so a failure never leaves a project that is neither legacy</span>
    <span class="c1"># nor profile layout.</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">legacy_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">legacy_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unlink</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="n">tasks_root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_profile_tasks_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">tasks_root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_dir</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">task_path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">tasks_root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glob</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;*.json&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">task</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">legacy_target</span>
            <span class="n">write_json_model_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">summary</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;migration_manifest&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">migration_manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">relative_to</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_root</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">summary</span></div>

</pre></div>
